## Checklist

### For new failure patterns:
- [ ] Includes: name, symptoms, root cause, detection method, real-world example
- [ ] Follows existing pattern format in `docs/failure-patterns/`
- [ ] Cross-referenced with related patterns

### For new skills:
- [ ] YAML frontmatter with all required fields
- [ ] HARDLINE rules use SHALL/MUST
- [ ] Tested with at least one real session

### For documentation:
- [ ] No broken links
- [ ] Consistent with project terminology
- [ ] CommonMark-compatible markdown
